productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Darcy Purple Kidswear
description: CompositionPurple round neck top made of 100% cotton, with sublime front print in negative effect and short sleeves with gathered sidesFittingRegular15 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Indulge your little one in happy feelings with this red tee from Levi's. The negative print of a young girl with branding fills this tee with a spirit of wonder and happiness. Team this with small white skirts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
